mission.title: linkerd: Ignore pods with status.phase=Succeeded when watching IP addresses
mission.description:
Ignore pods with status.phase=Succeeded when watching IP addresses

When a pod terminates successfully, some CNIs will assign its IP address
to newly created pods. This can lead to duplicate pod IPs in the same
Kubernetes cluster.

Filter out pods which are in a Succeeded phase since they are not 
routable anymore.

Fixes #5394

resolution.summary: This looks great to me.   @kforsthoevel are you able to test this branch and confirm if it fixes #5394 for you?
steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
